# INDeleteTasksTaskUnsupportedReason.noTasksInApp

**Case**

No tasks exist in the app.

## Declaration

```swift
case noTasksInApp
```

## Discussion

Use this reason when there are no tasks in the app. If tasks exist, but do not match the user’s intent, use [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INDeleteTasksTaskUnsupportedReason/noTasksFound]

## Reasons

- **INDeleteTasksTaskUnsupportedReason.noTasksFound**: No relevant tasks found.
